description: Edmunds is an automotive information and shopping service that publishes vehicle data, editorial content, dealer information, pricing, and media. Its public developer program has been retired, and API access is now limited to selected partners and dealership-related users.
summary: Edmunds exposes a partner-only REST API at `https://api.edmunds.com/` authenticated by query-string API key, plus a catalog-listed public MCP endpoint at `https://www.edmunds.com/mcp/map/emo/` with no auth.
